lint.command: No configured lint command found in pyproject.toml, repo config files, or .factory/services.yaml; compileall plus passing pytest suite used as available validation coverage.

rejectedObservations.observation: Spawn dedicated scrutiny-feature-reviewer subagents for each completed feature.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because every Task invocation failed immediately with insufficient permission to proceed, so manual synthesis from transcripts and current diffs was used instead
